## The argument

<!-- One paragraph, in site voice: what map(s) does this essay read against the
grain, and what does it argue? Remember — every map is an argument, not a neutral
window. If it only illustrates, it is not yet an essay. -->

## Room & metadata

- **Eras / regions / lenses** (draft facets):
- **Year range** (`yearFrom` – `yearTo`; negative = BC):
- **Accent** (proposed identity colour, muted humanist tone):
- **Series** (e.g. "Invisible Maps"), if any:

## Corpus & rights

- **Source sheets** (own material vs. external IIIF):
- **Rights status** — are external sources cleared for use? Flag any unknowns early;
  corpus rights are the most common blocker.

## Definition of done

This essay merges only when the [definition of done](../../docs/essay-definition-of-done.md)
is met (builds & validates, content & voice, accessibility, performance, design &
integration). Confirm you have read it before promoting this to an epic.
